themes.exampleQuote: A little bit of Paris in Pittsburgh.
The seasonal La Ruche from La Gourmandine might be the best dessert I have ever had.
Nut and chocolate croissants that were all fantastic... the cream puff was delicious.
You can call ahead if you know what you want. It is busy on weekends.
Travel everywhere, eat anything. This place was the find of Pittsburgh.

notable_quote: The seasonal La Ruche from La Gourmandine might be the best dessert I have ever had.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers reach for superlatives around the pastry case—specifically the seasonal specials, croissants, and cream puffs—with the Paris-in-Pittsburgh frame appearing repeatedly; the only friction is weekend crowds and occasional questions about whether specific items are still available.
quarter_narrative: Twenty-six Pittsburgh creators filmed La Gourmandine Lawrenceville this quarter and posted none of it back at them—109,000 TikTok plays generated entirely without the business lifting a finger on its own account, which last posted to Instagram 40 days ago and has put nothing on the feed in the past month. That gap is the defining story of their Spring 2026: the city is actively narrating this place, and the place is silent. Meanwhile, Page's holds the Pittsburgh Sweets family lead on social momentum, the exact signal where La Gourmandine—#1 in Pittsburgh Bakeries with 1,294 Google reviews and a conversion path that couldn't be cleaner—scores lowest. The rank climbs when the business starts talking back to the city that's already talking about it.
tldr_read: Twenty-six creators, 109K TikTok plays, zero Instagram posts in 30 days—dominant reviews and a perfect conversion path, but the social signal has gone quiet. Ones to Watch, #1 in Pittsburgh Bakeries.
tldr_meaning: Every structural signal is in place—reviews, photos, discoverability, creator attention—and the only axis suppressing the rank is the business's own posting cadence, which has flatlined while external momentum continues to build.

playbook.headline: Restart the Instagram feed, now
playbook.action: Zero posts in 30 days while 26 creators are actively filming the shop—one weekly post closes that gap faster than anything else.

playbook.headline: Turn creator TikToks into owned content
playbook.action: Repost or respond to the 30+ tagged TikToks on @lagourmandine—@lilbigbackz's 23,700-play video is a free content asset sitting unused.

playbook.headline: Surface seasonal specials before they sell out
playbook.action: The La Ruche and deluxe de pistache appear in reviews as items people hunt for—naming them on the profile before weekends reduces the 'is this still available' review pattern.
